risks.problem: HarmonyOS background execution policy differs from iOS BGAppRefreshTask. Exact 15-minute background execution parity may not be available. Background task scheduling APIs and constraints vary significantly.
risks.decision_needed: Determine acceptable background refresh behavior: What minimum refresh interval is acceptable? Is foreground refresh sufficient?
risks.recommended_action: Wrap background scheduling behind BackgroundRefreshAdapter. Keep foreground refresh as primary path. Implement background refresh as best-effort enhancement. Define product-acceptable fallback behavior.

risks.problem: No direct equivalent to iCloud Key-Value Store. Cloud sync requires choosing a HarmonyOS-compatible backend (AppGallery Connect, custom server, or none). This affects cross-device settings and saved article sync.
risks.decision_needed: Choose cloud sync backend strategy: AppGallery Connect, custom cloud storage, or disable cloud sync entirely for first release.
risks.recommended_action: Create CloudSyncAdapter interface with no-op default. Do not block local persistence on cloud sync. Defer cloud backend integration to a follow-up release. Disable sync UI in settings until backend is chosen.

risks.problem: iOS NaturalLanguage framework provides on-device sentiment scoring and named entity recognition. HarmonyOS may not have an equivalent on-device NLP Kit with same capabilities. This affects article sentiment badges and entity badges.
risks.decision_needed: Determine if HarmonyOS provides equivalent NLP APIs, or if heuristic/local implementation is acceptable.
risks.recommended_action: Investigate HarmonyOS AI/NLP Kit availability. Prepare fallback heuristic implementation for sentiment (keyword-based) and entity extraction (regex-based). Keep analysis API contract stable. Do not block feed display on analysis failure.

risks.problem: WidgetKit's small/medium/large widget model differs from HarmonyOS Form Kit / Service Widget architecture. Timeline provider pattern may not map directly. Shared storage between app and widget extension needs investigation.
risks.decision_needed: Determine HarmonyOS widget/card form factor support and packaging requirements. Decide whether to implement all three sizes or start with one.
risks.recommended_action: Treat widget as separate deliverable. Start with single card size (2x2 or 4x1). Preserve shared cache service contract. Defer full small/medium/large parity if initial implementation is costly.

risks.problem: Local loopback HTTP server (127.0.0.1:37436) may not be suitable for HarmonyOS app store distribution. Platform may restrict local network server behavior in distributed apps.
risks.decision_needed: Decide whether local API is needed for HarmonyOS version. If needed for debugging only, consider debug-only build configuration.
risks.recommended_action: Confirm whether local loopback API is required. If retained, isolate behind optional LocalApiAdapter. Disable in release builds. Consider removing for store distribution.

risks.problem: Notification permission model and local notification scheduling differ between iOS and HarmonyOS. Badge behavior may require platform-specific handling.
risks.decision_needed: Verify Notification Kit permission flow and local notification publish API match product requirements.
risks.recommended_action: Implement notification adapter early for testing. Separate permission state from publish API. Keep in-app keyword match badge and foreground alert as fallback.

risks.problem: Location permission request flow and accuracy levels differ between CoreLocation and Location Kit. Approximate vs precise location semantics may vary.
risks.decision_needed: Verify Location Kit provides equivalent when-in-use location with acceptable accuracy for weather and local news.
risks.recommended_action: Implement location adapter early. Support manual city/ZIP fallback for all location-dependent features. Test permission denial path.

risks.problem: AVSpeechSynthesizer TTS behavior and voice availability differ from HarmonyOS Speech Kit. Language support, speech rate, and pause/resume behavior may vary.
risks.decision_needed: Verify HarmonyOS Speech Kit provides equivalent TTS with comparable language and control support.
risks.recommended_action: Implement TTS adapter early. Keep state machine (start/pause/resume/next/previous/stop) isolated from platform object. Prepare textual briefing fallback if TTS is unavailable.

risks.problem: WKWebView UIViewRepresentable integration pattern differs from ArkUI Web component. Navigation delegate callbacks and loading state handling need adaptation.
risks.decision_needed: Verify ArkWeb component supports required URL loading and navigation state callbacks.
risks.recommended_action: Use page-level wrapper for WebView lifecycle. Preserve loading state and close/share actions. Test with various article URLs.

risks.problem: iOS App Group shared UserDefaults pattern for widget data sharing may not map directly to HarmonyOS cross-module data sharing.
risks.decision_needed: Determine HarmonyOS equivalent for sharing cached data between main app and widget/card extension.
risks.recommended_action: Implement SharedStorageAdapter with clean API. Do not leak iOS App Group terminology. Use app-local preferences until widget sharing architecture is confirmed.

risks.problem: Foundation XMLParser is a SAX-style delegate parser. HarmonyOS XML parsing APIs may differ in approach (DOM vs SAX). RSS and Atom feed formats have edge cases in date parsing, HTML content, and namespace handling.
risks.decision_needed: Verify available XML parsing APIs can handle RSS 2.0 and Atom feeds with same robustness.
risks.recommended_action: Implement RssParser as pure utility with comprehensive edge case handling. Test with real RSS feeds from NewsMobile sources. Normalize date parsing across formats.

risks.problem: URLSession async API patterns differ from HarmonyOS HTTP request API. Timeout handling, error types, and response parsing may need adjustment.
risks.recommended_action: Create HttpClient wrapper abstracting platform differences. Preserve timeout/error fallback behavior. Use fixed sample data when network fails.

risks.problem: UserDefaults key-value patterns map well to Preferences, but serialization format and key naming conventions need adjustment.
risks.recommended_action: Create typed PersistenceStore with explicit migration keys and default values. Keep JSON serialization approach.

risks.problem: SwiftUI ShareLink is a declarative component. HarmonyOS share API may be imperative. Share sheet appearance and behavior may differ.
risks.recommended_action: Implement imperative shareUrl API. Add clipboard copy fallback if share sheet unavailable.
